name: Window Items
desc: Sends the full contents of an inventory window — all slots at once. Used for initial container opening and rejected transaction recovery.

fields.name: items
fields.desc: Array of all ItemStacks in the window, slot by slot

notes: For windowId=0, this updates the entire player inventory (45 slots: 9 hotbar + 36 main). For chests, this is sent immediately after S2DPacketOpenWindow. When a C0E click is rejected (S32 accepted=false), the server re-sends S30 to force the client to revert its inventory.

modules.name: ChestStealer
modules.purpose: Full inventory sync — trigger auto-steal on chest contents.

modules.name: InvManager
modules.purpose: Full inventory sync — trigger auto-steal on chest contents.

modules.name: AutoArmor
modules.purpose: Full inventory sync — trigger auto-steal on chest contents.
